question: Does the generated image depict a top-down architectural floor plan of a residential apartment?
Does the layout include exactly 2 living areas, specifically a Living Room and a Dining Room?
Does the floor plan contain exactly 2 bathrooms?
Does the Master Bedroom area include both an attached en-suite bathroom and a walk-in closet?
Does the floor plan include both a Kitchen and a Balcony?
Are numerical room dimensions present and labeled for all major rooms?
Do the dimension values appear to be in millimeters (e.g., typically 3 or 4-digit numbers like 3000, 4500) rather than meters or feet?
Are the swing directions of both sliding doors and hinged doors indicated using dashed lines?
Is there a clear visual distinction between load-bearing walls (thick solid lines) and partition walls (thin solid lines)?
Are both a scale bar and a north arrow present in the bottom right corner of the image?
Are the text labels for room names and dimensions legible and free from severe garbling?
Are the architectural lines (walls, windows, doors) straight and crisp, without unnatural waviness or breaks?
